This range has been partially allocated. See [IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space] for details.
Deprecated as of December 2004 [RFC4048]. Formerly an OSI NSAP-mapped prefix set [RFC4548].

The IPv6 Unicast space encompasses the entire IPv6 address range 
with the exception of ff00::/8, per [RFC4291]. IANA unicast address 
assignments are currently limited to the IPv6 unicast address 
range of 2000::/3. IANA assignments from this block are registered 
in [IPv6 Global Unicast Address Space].

This range has been partially allocated. See [IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space] for details. 5f00::/8 (with 3ffe::/16, as noted at [IPv6 Global Unicast Address Space]) was used for the 6bone, but returned [RFC5156].
See [IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space] for details.
